# Piyush Mishra — Portfolio

> Portfolio of Piyush Mishra, a creative developer and designer building calm, fast, animated web experiences with React and TypeScript.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Introduction, what I do, and quick links.
- [About](/about): My story, values, and background.
- [Services](/services): Web design, frontend engineering, mobile apps, SEO, and digital marketing.
- [Skills](/skills): Tech stack and core skills.
- [Projects](/projects): Selected e-commerce, AI/SaaS, agency, and concept work.
- [Testimonials](/testimonials): Kind words from teammates and clients.
- [Contact](/contact): Email, WhatsApp, and project inquiry form.
